name: TVFN Chef Du Jour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, heat some canola oil over medium heat. Add the julienned ginger and Galangal and sauté until softened.
2. Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent.
3. Stir in the Thai bird chiles, white lemongrass, crabfish sayce, chicken stock, rice wine vinegar, ground white pepper, and Thai basil leaves.
4. Bring to a simmer and reduce by about 15-20 percent.
5. Strain the broth into a clean bowl or pot, discarding any solids.
6. Place a small mound of Enoki mushrooms in the center of each serving plate.
7. Divide the hot broth among the plates and top with snapper.
8. Garnish with sliced scallions and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 portions
